title: Italian Roasted Ravioli
description: A simple yet flavorful dish that pairs the comfort of roasted ravioli with the tanginess of pickles.
instructions: Place the ravioli on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle with olive oil and sprinkle with garlic, parmesan cheese, and basil (if using).
Toss the ravioli to coat evenly.
Roast in the preheated oven for 15-20 minutes, or until golden brown.
While the ravioli is roasting, heat a skillet over medium heat.
Add the sliced pickles and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until slightly caramelized.
Serve the roasted ravioli with the pickles on top.
Optional: sprinkle with extra parmesan cheese and basil.
